creator: wdr@tdl.com
text:
Here's a patch:

*** hostname.1.old      Mon Dec 20 15:11:53 1999
--- hostname.1  Mon Dec 20 16:33:58 1999
***************
*** 50,55 ****
--- 50,59 ----
  .Pa /etc/rc.network ,
  normally run at boot
  time.
+ The preferred method of setting the hostname is by defining the variable
+ .Va hostname
+ in
+ .Pa /etc/rc.conf .
  .Pp
  Options:
  .Bl -tag -width flag
***************
*** 58,64 ****
  name.
  .El
  .Sh SEE ALSO
! .Xr gethostname 3
  .Sh HISTORY
  The
  .Nm
--- 62,69 ----
  name.
  .El
  .Sh SEE ALSO
! .Xr gethostname 3 , 
! .Xr rc.conf 5
  .Sh HISTORY
  The
  .Nm
